title: U3A Plettenbergbaai besoek Graaff-Reinet Museum
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Anziske Kayster, managing director of the Graaff-Reinet Museum, enjoyed a delightful visit from extinguished guests from Plettenberg Bay on Thursday 4 August.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Anziske Kayster, managing director of the Graaff-Reinet Museum, enjoyed a delightful visit from extinguished guests from Plettenberg Bay on Thursday 4 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The Graaff-Reinet Museum was delighted to host members of the University of the Third Age (U3A) Plettenberg Bay branch, during their recent visit,” said Kayster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group enjoyed a two-hour guided tour of Reinet House, the Military Museum, Urquhart House and the Old Residency, where the well-informed staff of the museum complex presented the tours.","html":"The group enjoyed a two-hour guided tour of Reinet House, the Military Museum, Urquhart House and the Old Residency, where the well-informed staff of the museum complex presented the tours."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“A special word of thanks goes to Prof Johannes Haarhoff for leading the tour at the Military Museum.","html":"“A special word of thanks goes to Prof Johannes Haarhoff for leading the tour at the Military Museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visit sparked many discussions, as the U3A members posed numerous questions, all of which Haarhoff answered with great detail and insight,” said Kayster.","html":"The visit sparked many discussions, as the U3A members posed numerous questions, all of which Haarhoff answered with great detail and insight,” said Kayster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What is the U3A?The University of the Third Age is a non-profit organisation for \"third agers\", ie, retired people or senior citizens.","html":"What is the U3A?
The University of the Third Age is a non-profit organisation for \"third agers\", ie, retired people or senior citizens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisation started in France in 1968 and now has branches in over 36 countries.","html":"The organisation started in France in 1968 and now has branches in over 36 countries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are more than 28 branches in South Africa including five in the Johannesburg area. Members of any U3A branch may join functions at any other branch worldwide.","html":"There are more than 28 branches in South Africa including five in the Johannesburg area. Members of any U3A branch may join functions at any other branch worldwide."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moreover, information about some of the activities of other branches and links to live-recorded zoom sessions are circulated to members.","html":"Moreover, information about some of the activities of other branches and links to live-recorded zoom sessions are circulated to members."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to a monthly lecture programme, the U3A has a number of small groups that cater for people with a variety of interests. These groups meet in private homes or agreed venues under the guidance of a course leader.","html":"In addition to a monthly lecture programme, the U3A has a number of small groups that cater for people with a variety of interests. These groups meet in private homes or agreed venues under the guidance of a course leader."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Usually R10 is charged to cover the cost of refreshments, although some courses may request a larger fee to cover costs such as paper and printing.","html":"Usually R10 is charged to cover the cost of refreshments, although some courses may request a larger fee to cover costs such as paper and printing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Most course activities are held during the day. At U3A, learning is for pleasure.","html":"Most course activities are held during the day. At U3A, learning is for pleasure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No qualifications are required for admission, and nobody is awarded, as fellowship and love of learning are the focus of the organisation, without the pressure of exams or qualifications.","html":"No qualifications are required for admission, and nobody is awarded, as fellowship and love of learning are the focus of the organisation, without the pressure of exams or qualifications."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The “third age” refers to that wonderful phase of life that follows full-time work and family responsibilities – a time for personal growth, learning, and new adventures.","html":"The “third age” refers to that wonderful phase of life that follows full-time work and family responsibilities – a time for personal growth, learning, and new adventures."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
